title: PostCSS configuration for Tailwind CSS and autoprefixer
purpose: Configures PostCSS to process CSS files with Tailwind CSS and autoprefixer plugins for automatic vendor prefixing.
module_context: Exports a configuration object that defines PostCSS plugins to be applied to CSS files.

steps.content: Define the PostCSS plugin configuration object.
Specify Tailwind CSS as one of the plugins to process CSS.
Specify autoprefixer as another plugin to add vendor prefixes.
Return the complete plugin configuration for PostCSS processing.
